strategy: Round 1 he stacks three -200% Tower Shields on himself. Each blocks one hit, so a raw attack is wasted.
Break all three shields with cheap throwaway hits (wand hits, 0-pip spells) or use Shatter/Steal Ward, then land your real hit the same combat.
Hit with Fire - he takes 35% more from Fire and resists Ice 35%.
He can be stunned and beguiled; use a stun to buy a safe setup round if you need one.
The shields reapply 3 rounds after they are destroyed, so break them and hit within that window rather than stalling.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he puts three -200% Tower Shields on himself; each blocks one hit. Break all three (cheap hits, Shatter, or Steal Ward) before your real attack.
Destroyed shields come back 3 rounds later. Clear them and hit inside that window - do not stall.
